Our monoband RMS is usually on the same frequency as VK4DJC's: 7050.5 kHz dial, 380 km away. Occasionally we switch to 80m, 30m, 20m, 12m or 10m: check our freq on the Winlink map. Ask us for P2P if there's no Internet or to message direct.
